channel.title: Fahim Final News Feed
channel.description: Curated important news from multiple sources

item.title: Russian missiles strike Kyiv, killing one, wounding 13
item.description:
Matched Titles:
- Kyiv pounded in Russian missile barrage as air defences run low
- Russia launches deadly, massive ballistic missile attack in Kyiv, Ukraine
- Russia pounds Kyiv with ballistic missiles in escalating air war
- Russia Batters Kyiv in One of the Largest Missile Assaults of the War
- Russia Pounds Kyiv With Ballistic Missiles In Escalating Air War
- Russia launches major ballistic missile attack on Kyiv
- Russia unleashes one of biggest ballistic missile attacks of the Ukraine war, Kyiv says
- Russia launches major ballistic missile attack on Kyiv
- Russia Batters Kyiv in Overnight Attack
- Russian missiles strike Kyiv killing one, wounding 13
- Russian ballistic missiles rock Kyiv, one killed, officials say
- At least one killed as Russian ballistic missiles hit Kyiv
- Dozens of Russian missiles pound Kyiv in major attack
- Russian ballistic missiles rock Kyiv
- Russian ballistic missiles rock Kyiv
- Russian ballistic missiles rock Kyiv, one killed, officials say]]>

item.title: 5.5-magnitude earthquake kills at least five in Peru's Andes
item.description:
Matched Titles:
- 5.5 Magnitude Earthquake Hits Peru’s Andes Region, Killing at Least 6 People
- Earthquake shakes Peru's Andes region, killing at least 5, displacing hundreds

- Six die in earthquake in Peru
- Earthquake of 5.1 magnitude kills six in Peru
- 5.5-magnitude earthquake hits Peru's Andes region and kills at least 5 people
- 5.5 magnitude earthquake hits Peru's Andes region, killing at least 5 people
- 5.5 magnitude earthquake in Peru leaves at least five dead and dozens injured
- 5.5 magnitude earthquake hits Peru's Andes region and kills at least 5 people
- Two earthquakes hit Peru, killing at least 5 and injuring 21
- 5.5 magnitude earthquake hits Peru’s Andes region, killing at least 5 people
- 5.6 magnitude earthquake hits Peru
- Earthquake of 5.1 magnitude kills five in Peru
- 5.5 magnitude earthquake hits Peru's Andes region, killing at least 5 people
- Magnitude 5.1 earthquake in central Peru leaves at least five dead and ten injured
- Earthquake of magnitude 5.6 strikes central Peru, EMSC says
- 5.5-magnitude quake hits central Peru -- GFZ]]>
